skills.name: Carnivory
skills.description: Plant a carnivorous plant around the enemy nearby the caster and give continuous damage.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 1 second
Debuff Duration: 10 seconds
Targets: 6

skills.name: Shape Shifting
skills.description: Transform into a monster of the Animal-type, Plant-type or Insect-type in front of you for a given duration.
skills.effect_text:
Able to use the monster's skill
Maximum Duration: CaptionTime seconds
Maximum Level: 1

skills.name: Transform
skills.description: Transform back into the monster that you last shape shifted to.
skills.effect_text:
Able to use the monster's skill
Maximum Duration: CaptionTime seconds
Maximum Level: 1

skills.name: Chortasmata
skills.description: Grass temporarily grows on the targeted area. Enemies who step on the area receive Rash debuff and get continuous damage. Party members who step on the area recover HP by receiving the Floral Scent buff.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 1 second
Target: CaptionRatio3
Floral Scent Healing Factor per 1 second: CaptionRatio %
Magic Circle Duration: CaptionTime seconds
RashDuration: 20 seconds

skills.name: Lycanthropy
skills.description: Temporarily transform into a wolf. When transformed, the character's skills cannot be used. In wolf form, part of the stats increases and 2% of max. HP is restored every 8 seconds.
skills.effect_text:
Wolf skills activated
Damage + CaptionRatio %
Basic Movement Speed +10
Maximum HP x2
Physical and Magic Defense: +50%
Critical Rate + CaptionRatio2 %
Block Penetration: +10%
Maximum Duration CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Seed Bomb
skills.description: Apply Seed debuff to the enemy in front. Magic damage is dealt against enemies nearby when you are attacked or the buff expires during the debuff is applied. Immediately activates as 2 consecutive hits when using skill to the target under debuff
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Duration of Seed debuff: 2 seconds
Maximum targets of debuff: CaptionRatio
Targets: CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Thorn
skills.description: Throw thorny vines at enemies in front of you to deal continuous damage and make them unable to move.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 5
Enemies become unable to move for 3 seconds

attributes.name: Lycanthropy: Human Form
attributes.description:
* Transform into a human hybrid instead of a wolf when using [Lycanthropy]

* Alters stat increased and changes duration to 10 seconds

* Basic attack changes to Scratch (5% chance of Bleeding)

* Final Damage increases by [10.5 + Lycanthropy skill level x 2.1]%

Movement Speed +5

* Unable to use skills that changes the basic attack

attributes.name: Chortasmata: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Chortasmata] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Seed Bomb: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Seed Bomb] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Thorn: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Thorn] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Thorn: Bleeding
attributes.description: * 10% chance of inflicting Bleeding for 10 seconds on enemies affected by [Thorn]

attributes.name: Physical Stat: Druid
attributes.description:
* Stat Growth Ratio of Druid is changed.

* INT ↔ STR, SPR ↔ DEX

* Skill property of Druid is changed to physical

attributes.name: [Arts] Chortasmata: Healing Garden
attributes.description:
* Attack effect of [Chortasmata] skill is removed

Half of the skill factor is added to the healing factor (Maximum +350)

* Remove normal debuff by 10% chance

attributes.name: [Arts] Chortasmata: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Chortasmata] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Seed Bomb: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Seed Bomb] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Thorn: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Thorn] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Lycanthropy: Wolf's Spirit
attributes.description:
* Does not turn in to Human Form when using the [Lycanthropy] skill

* Changes the duration to 30 minutes

* Final Damage increases by [3.5 + skill level x 0.7]%

attributes.name: Carnivory: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Carnivory] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Carnivory: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Carnivory] by 1.25% per attribute level
